summary: Backend: 13/13 pytest tests pass (auth, location, hazards, channels, PTT, voice rejection, websocket auth+ping). Frontend: BLOCKED by critical runtime error 'ExpoSecureStore.default.deleteValueWithKeyAsync is not a function' which crashes the entire app on web before login screen renders. No frontend UI testing was possible.

minor.issue: Returns 500 (instead of 4xx) when audio_b64 is empty/invalid because Whisper SDK throws after temp file write. Functionally OK (non-200 as required) but a 400 with cleaner error would be better.

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: 'ExpoSecureStore.default.deleteValueWithKeyAsync is not a function' uncaught error renders red error overlay before any UI shows. Login/Map/Talk/Drive/Music/Garage screens are completely inaccessible on web. Original code used Platform.OS==='web' guard but on Expo SDK 55 web build the native binding still resolves and crashes. Tried lazy-require fallback in src/api.ts — error persists, suggesting resolution happens during static SSR pre-render or via auth.tsx import side-effects.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot reach login screen because clearToken() crashes during initial refresh()

react_native_issues.issue: Version mismatch warning: expected ~15.0.8 (Expo). Suggest `npx expo install expo-secure-store expo-linear-gradient expo-location react-native-svg` to align versions — likely root cause of the web binding mismatch.

action_items: Fix expo-secure-store web crash. Recommended approach: (a) run `npx expo install expo-secure-store expo-linear-gradient expo-location react-native-svg` to install Expo SDK-compatible versions, OR (b) replace expo-secure-store with platform-conditional storage using AsyncStorage on web/native by splitting into api.web.ts and api.native.ts files so Metro web bundle never imports expo-secure-store.
Re-test all frontend flows once login screen is reachable (5 tabs, PTT button, hazard report FAB, drive screen 4 hazard buttons, music 3 source tabs, garage save/logout)
Optional: return 400 instead of 500 for empty audio in /api/voice/transcribe by validating len(audio_bytes) > 0 before calling Whisper
critical_code_review_comments: expo-secure-store/expo-linear-gradient/expo-location/react-native-svg versions don't match Expo SDK — fix with `npx expo install`
Backend server.py is 466 lines, manageable; consider splitting routes into modules if it grows
CORS uses allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=False — fine for Bearer JWT but lock down in prod
Whisper transcribe path doesn't validate empty audio length pre-call (returns 500)
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/api.ts (attempted lazy-require fix for SecureStore — DID NOT resolve the web crash; main agent should revert/redo)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is solid — 13 pytest tests in /app/backend/tests/test_rev_radar.py cover all required endpoints + WS auth. Reuse them. Frontend is fully blocked by expo-secure-store web binding issue; once fixed, run the playwright flow in this iteration's logs to validate all testIDs. Demo creds: demo@revradar.app / demo1234.
rca_of_issue: Root cause: expo-secure-store@55.0.13 is incompatible with the installed Expo SDK (expected ~15.0.8). On web, even with `Platform.OS === 'web'` runtime guard, the module binding ExpoSecureStore.default lacks deleteValueWithKeyAsync. Reproduction: load app at https://motorist-hub.preview.emergentagent.com — error overlay 'ExpoSecureStore.default.deleteValueWithKeyAsync is not a function' appears immediately. Mitigation: use `npx expo install expo-secure-store` to install SDK-aligned version, or split api.ts into api.web.ts (localStorage) and api.native.ts (SecureStore) so the web bundle never imports expo-secure-store at all.
